# HRecipe

> A lovely home recipe management app focused on practicality.

HRecipe is a self-hosted, full-stack recipe manager built with Vue 3, Hono, and SQLite. It helps families organize recipes, plan meals, and generate shopping lists. Supports Chinese and English with automatic language detection.

## Core Pages

- `/` — Home page, lists all recipes with search and tag filtering
- `/recipes/:id` — Recipe detail page with ingredients, cooking steps, images, and reviews
- `/recipes/new` — Create a new recipe
- `/combos` — Meal combo list, combine multiple recipes into one meal
- `/combos/:id` — Combo detail page with included recipes and aggregated shopping list
- `/combos/new` — Create a new combo
- `/admin` — Admin control panel for managing ingredients, tags, and data

## Features

- Recipe CRUD with Markdown descriptions, multi-image upload, and ordered cooking steps
- Ingredient and tag management with search and filtering
- Meal combos — group multiple recipes, auto-calculate total cooking time
- Shopping list generation — auto-merge same ingredients, copy as plain text
- Cooking slideshow — fullscreen step-by-step view with images
- Review system — rate and comment on recipes (toggleable via env var)
- i18n — built-in Simplified Chinese and English, auto-detects browser language
- Dark / light theme — follows system preference or manual toggle
- SQLite database — zero-config, single-file persistence
- Docker deployment — single command to run

## MCP Server

HRecipe provides a built-in [Model Context Protocol](https://modelcontextprotocol.io) server at the `/mcp` endpoint. AI assistants (Claude, GitHub Copilot, etc.) can connect via Streamable HTTP transport to manage recipe data programmatically.

### MCP Client Configuration

```json
{
  "servers": {
    "hrecipe": {
      "type": "streamable-http",
      "url": "http://localhost:3000/mcp"
    }
  }
}
```
